issues.title: Undefined names used as default parameter values
AttemptManager.__exit__ suppresses KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and GeneratorExit
issues.invariant: KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and GeneratorExit must always propagate; retry logic must not suppress process/generator lifecycle signals

issues.title: Retrying.__call__ catches BaseException including KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit
issues.invariant: Process-level signals (KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit) must propagate immediately without passing through retry/wait/stop machinery

issues.title: iter() mutates actions list during for-loop iteration
issues.invariant: Never mutate a collection during for-loop iteration; use explicit index-based iteration when the collection is expected to grow

issues.title: raise retry_exc from None when outcome has no exception
issues.invariant: Only use `raise X from Y` when Y is a known exception instance; bare `raise X` preserves implicit context for debugging

issues.title: wrapped_f.statistics has a race condition between threads
